isolation.ownerAuth: Generated __session cookie for user_test_001 (mock auth JWT)
isolation.viewerAuth: Fresh share token via POST /api/shares, validated via POST /api/viewer/validate (no owner cookie on viewer dismissal check)

steps.expected: At least one live insight type is present before dismissal
Both calls return 200 with identical confirmation payload
steps.observed: Both calls returned 200 with identical { insight_type: "elevated_rhr", date: "2026-04-04", dismissed: true }

steps.action: Create fresh share token, validate viewer session, then POST dismiss with grant_token and viewer cookie (no owner cookie)
steps.observed: 403 with { error.code: "FORBIDDEN", message: "Only the data owner can dismiss insights" }

evidence.network: GET /api/views/night -> 200; POST dismiss(owner)x2 -> 200/200; POST dismiss(no auth) -> 401; POST /api/shares -> 201; POST /api/viewer/validate -> 200; POST dismiss(viewer+grant_token) -> 403

assertions.title: Dismissal scoped to specific date and type

steps.action: Check same type on different date (2026-04-03)
steps.observed: elevated_rhr remained present before and after owner dismissal

steps.action: Check different type on same date (2026-04-04)
steps.observed: low_sleep_score remained present after elevated_rhr dismissal

steps.action: Call invalid type and invalid date formats
Cross-user isolation: sign in user B, dismiss same pair as user B, then re-check owner night view before owner dismissal
steps.expected: User B dismissal does not affect user A
steps.observed: Owner still saw ["elevated_rhr","low_sleep_score"] after user B dismissal

evidence.network: POST dismiss(userB) -> 200; GET night(owner, same date) unchanged -> 200; POST dismiss(owner) -> 200; GET night(other date) unchanged -> 200; invalid type/date dismiss -> 400/400

assertions.title: Dismissed insights filtered from all view endpoint responses

steps.action: Before dismissal, fetch night/recovery/trend for target date 2026-03-23 and target type low_sleep_score
steps.expected: Capture cross-view baseline for target type
steps.observed: Night insights ["low_sleep_score","suppressed_hrv"]; Recovery insights ["low_sleep_score","suppressed_hrv"]; Trend insights []

steps.expected: Target type absent across view responses; other types remain
steps.observed: Night insights ["suppressed_hrv"]; Recovery insights ["suppressed_hrv"]; Trend insights [] (target absent before and after)

steps.expected: Insights include target type and length <= 3

steps.action: Dismiss low_sleep_score for 2026-03-23 and re-fetch night view
steps.expected: Dismissed type removed; list remains capped at 3
steps.observed: After dismissal, insights ["suppressed_hrv"] (length 1); dismissed type absent

evidence.network: GET night before -> 200; POST dismiss -> 200; GET night after -> 200

frictions.description: Trend endpoint requires explicit metrics query parameter; initial trend call without metrics returned 400 validation error.
frictions.resolution: Retried trend requests with metrics=rhr,hrv,sleep_score for before/after evidence collection.

frictions.description: Previously-dismissed dates from earlier runs reduced available same-date multi-insight candidates.
frictions.resolution: Switched assertion sampling dates (2026-04-04 for scoping/auth checks and 2026-03-23 for cross-view filtering) where required insight combinations were still present.

summary: Tested 4 assertions via live curl API flows: 4 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. Captured idempotency, owner/viewer auth enforcement, date/type scoping, cross-user isolation, and night/recovery/trend before/after dismissal evidence.
